title: One Player Sleep plugin
description: Allows the night to be skipped when just one player sleeps — perfect for servers and multiplayer worlds!
body:
🌙 One Player Sleep Plugin (Minecraft 1.21.10+)

Tired of waiting for every player to go to bed before night ends?
With this One Player Sleep Plugin, only one player needs to sleep to skip the night instantly — making survival servers and multiplayer worlds smoother, faster, and way more fun!

This lightweight plugin ensures your world’s day-night cycle never gets stuck because someone is AFK or mining underground.

🧠 Features

✅ One Player Sleep System
Skip the night as soon as one player sleeps — no more waiting for everyone!

⚙️ Fully Automatic
No commands required. The plugin detects when a player enters a bed and turns night into day automatically.

🌤️ Weather Clearing Option (optional)
You can configure the plugin to also clear rain or thunderstorms after skipping the night.

💬 Customizable Messages
Display a custom message when someone sleeps, like:

“⭐ [PlayerName] decided to sleep — skipping the night!”

🧑‍🤝‍🧑 Perfect for Multiplayer Servers
Whether you have 2 or 200 players, the night will pass instantly when someone sleeps.

🔧 Lightweight & Lag-Free
Optimized code ensures zero performance impact on your world or server.
